user.title: Taiwan CWA Weather Setup
user.description:
Get your free API key at [opendata.cwa.gov.tw](https://opendata.cwa.gov.tw/). Register → Member Center → Apply for API Key.

請至 [opendata.cwa.gov.tw](https://opendata.cwa.gov.tw/) 免費申請 API Key。註冊後進入「會員中心」→「API授權碼申請」。

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to CWA API. Please check your network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please verify your CWA API key.
error.city_not_found: City not found in CWA data. Please select a valid city.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.

init.title: Manage Cities / 管理監測城市
init.description:
Select the cities to monitor. Each city creates 4 sensors (weather, rain probability, min/max temperature). Changes take effect after reloading.

⚠️ At least one city must remain selected. To remove the integration entirely, delete it from Settings → Devices & Services.

勾選要監測的城市，每個城市會建立 4 個 sensor（天氣狀況、降雨機率、最低溫、最高溫）。儲存後整合會自動重新載入。

⚠️ 至少需保留一個城市；若要完全移除整合，請到「設定 → 裝置與服務」刪除整合。

confirm_remove.title: Confirm Removal / 確認移除
confirm_remove.description:
⚠️ The following cities will be removed, along with their devices and sensors. This cannot be undone.

以下城市將被移除，對應的裝置與 sensor 也會一併刪除。此動作無法復原。

{cities}

Press Submit to confirm, or go back to cancel.
按「提交」確認，或返回取消。

error.no_cities: At least one city must remain selected. To remove the integration entirely, delete it from Settings → Devices & Services. / 至少需保留一個城市；若要完全移除整合，請到「設定 → 裝置與服務」刪除整合。
